title: Section 21
content: (1) No coffee which has been exported from India shall be re-imported into 1[India] except under and in accordance with permit granted by the Board. (2) The Board may in any fit case grant such a permit and no charge shall be made therefor.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and Sch., for "the States".
